title: Fort Departure
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Fort Departure''' was the only permanent settlement on the moon [[Vilhon]] orbiting the planet [[Vycinyth]] in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. It maintained a simple service [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] and quarters. Vilhon was maintained as a hunting preserve and many expeditions began at Fort Departure (although there were several plains on the moon where ships could land). Airspeeders could be rented at the settlement.<ref name="LOTE">''[[Lords of the Expanse]]''</ref>

==Sources==
